ggbscript.val: SetValue[s001, false] SetValue[s010, false] SetValue[s100, false] SetValue[x001, false] SetValue[x010, false] SetValue[x011, false] SetValue[x020, false] SetValue[x021, false] SetValue[x030, false] SetValue[x031, false] SetValue[x100, false] SetValue[x110, false] SetValue[x120, false] SetValue[x130, false] SetValue[y001, false] SetValue[y002, false] SetValue[y010, false] SetValue[y011, false] SetValue[y011, false] SetValue[y012, false] SetValue[y020, false] SetValue[y021, false] SetValue[y022, false] SetValue[y100, false] SetValue[y101, false] SetValue[y110, false] SetValue[y111, false] SetValue[y120, false] SetValue[y121, false] SetValue[y200, false] SetValue[y210, false] SetValue[y220, false] SetValue[z001, false] SetValue[z010, false] SetValue[z011, false] SetValue[z020, false] SetValue[z021, false] SetValue[z030, false] SetValue[z031, false] SetValue[z100, false] SetValue[z110, false] SetValue[z120, false] SetValue[z130, false] SetValue[vol, false]

expression.label: text2
expression.exp: "\text{Construct a copy of the blue model by clicking on the faces of the red blocks. \\Fnd its volume.}"

expression.label: text4
expression.exp: "\text{The model is made of cubic centimeter blocks. What is its volume?}"

expression.label: text3
expression.exp: "\Large\text{The volume of the model is:\;\;}\fgcolor{red}\text{" + (LaTeX[count1 + count2 + count3]) + "\;cm^3}"
